name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: we need your help to get out the vote, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Election Day 2018 is 11 days away from today -- and in Arizona, where many voters cast their ballots by mail, it might as well already be Election Day! So here at Team O'Halleran, our get-out-the-vote
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e05/1a8421e1/19b2fee6f/496de38d/3266006293/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friend, Election Day 2018 is 11 days away from today -- and in Arizona, where many voters cast their ballots by mail, it might as well already be Election Day. _**More than 60,000 people have already voted in our district! **_ **So here at Team O 'Halleran, our get-out-the-vote operation is ramping up quickly. **We have a team of staffers and a group of very dedicated volunteers on the ground devoted to the early vote. They're helping our supporters request their ballots and they're talking to undecided voters at their doors to make sure they know the truth about Tom's record before they vote. Keeping up such an ambitious early vote program is expensive, friend, but it's critical, because we need to post a strong showing in the early vote to win this race. [**Can you make a donation now to help us keep it up?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.26_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Remember, friend, Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and Wendy Rogers is claiming late momentum. This thing could come down to a handful of votes, so every early vote we can turn out really, really matters! [**Chip in to help us if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.26_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.26_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

Peter, a recent report by a United Nations panel of scientists had a dire conclusion: **we have just 12 years to take major action to curb the effects of climate change, or the damage could be permanent.**

It's up to us to elect leaders who believe the science and have demonstrated a clear commitment to the policies we need to combat climate change. It's also going to take all of our voices, together, to tackle this problem. **[Will you fill out our Climate Change Survey?](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036697/4ac3d62d/6a026265/1ce2998a/1363081348/VEsE/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/181026_Climate-Survey?source=RTW_181026_Survey_EM")** | | ******[ADD YOUR VOICE>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036697/4ac3d62d/6a026265/1ce2998a/1363081348/VEsF/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/181026_Climate-Survey?source=RTW_181026_Survey_EM")******

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: Field update (and important request)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I just wanted to reach out with a quick update from the field -- and an
important request. Right now, Texas is breaking records in voter turnout
-- but we need to keep pressing aggressively, reaching as many of our
supporters as we can in these final 11 days.

But we’re being heavily out-PACed, and we have just hours before Texas’s
biggest weekend of voter contact, ever. Our team is going to knock on
400,000 doors. The funds we raise now will impact where we focus our
efforts through the weekend.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181026&t=1019&akid=21593%2E444211%2EHrX1Wg ]Can you chip in right now to our organizing efforts to get out Beto
voters? Your donations right now could mean the difference between victory
and defeat.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181026&t=1020&akid=21593%2E444211%2EHrX1Wg ]Contribute
$3
»

Right now, we have hundreds of field staff who are supporting thousands of
volunteers to contact millions of Texas voters. We’re fired up and ready
to win, but we’d be kidding ourselves if we didn’t admit we’re also a bit
tired.

No one has ever attempted a grassroots operation of this scale in Texas.
Our team is working as hard as possible to pull it off -- because that’s
what it’s going to take to take on Ted Cruz and the eleven outside groups
in his corner and WIN.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181026&t=1021&akid=21593%2E444211%2EHrX1Wg ]It’s absolutely critical that we reach our end-of-month fundraising
goal. Right now is the time our investments will make the biggest
difference. That’s why your donation right now means so much.

We’re putting in the hard work of building at the grassroots level -- door
to door, town to town, city to city -- and that’s what will make all the
difference, for Texas and for our country.

Thanks for everything,

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

P.S. Just look at these photos from our team! We still manage to have fun,
too :)

name: Congressman John Lewis
subject: at a crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It is imperative that we elect new leaders this November who have the courage to come to Congress and take action to defend the rights of all Americans. One such leader is Abigail Spanberger.
| | Peter, _Our country is at a crossroads._ From attempts to curtail voting rights to actions to undermine access to health care, some of our most basic rights as Americans are under attack by the current Administration and others in power in Washington. It is imperative that we elect new leaders this November who have the courage to come to Congress and take action to defend the rights of all Americans. **One such leader, Peter, is Abigail Spanberger** \-- a true public servant who will stand up for every Virginian in Washington. [**Peter, will you join me in supporting Abigail with a donation today, ahead of her important fundraising deadline on Wednesday?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW_PYz7-UyKFZVGiZ1NDsBjx9SKZPJnKq7YQAK-Q15I=/xMHmau66UPr-FV-EQvKy0Rt7iRpzb8rz88GP3wy2aiM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.27_b1_jl_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Millions of Americans have responded to recent attacks on our rights not with silence, but with action -- by exercising their right to vote, by writing their representatives and senators, and of course by marching on Washington, as fellow activists and I did to demand our civil rights years ago. This outpouring of activism by everyday Americans has been inspiring. But marching is not where our movement ends. We must take our cause to the ballot box. Abigail will defend and respect the rights of all Virginians in Congress, and she will work to improve her community through advocating for common-sense gun safety measures and lowering health care costs and expanding access to care. Abigail will be a partner for justice in Washington, but her race this fall is very competitive, so she needs our support today so she can keep up the fight for all of us. [**Peter, consider helping me elect Abigail with a donation of any size today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW_PYz7-UyKFZVGiZ1NDsBjx9SKZPJnKq7YQAK-Q15I=/xMHmau66UPr-FV-EQvKy0Rt7iRpzb8rz88GP3wy2aiM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.27_b1_jl_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Congressman John Lewis [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW_PYz7-UyKFZVGiZ1NDsBjx9SKZPJnKq7YQAK-Q15I=/xMHmau66UPr-FV-EQvKy0Rt7iRpzb8rz88GP3wy2aiM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.27_b1_jl_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW_PYz7-UyKFZVGiZ1NDsBjx9SKZPJnKq7YQAK-Q15I=/xMHmau66UPr-FV-EQvKy0Rt7iRpzb8rz88GP3wy2aiM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW_PYz7-UyKFZVGiZ1NDsBjx9SKZPJnKq7YQAK-Q15I=/IoucegnU3VYgDOQ85EwpS-YJrEFg0EMECT62Lc10ksI=)_

Friends,

Mayor Andrew Gillum's proposal for Florida is pretty simple: He wants our state and economy to work for every Floridian, no matter which rung of the economic ladder they fall on.

Mayor Gillum was the first in his immediate family to graduate from college -- but he knows higher education isn't the path for every Floridian. He believes that everyone, regardless of what they look like or where they live, deserves to earn a good wage that doesn't require them to have three jobs.

**[Watch our new TV ad, and then chip in $5 to make sure voters across the state hear about our bold, progressive plans.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3609/9e00690/54b901bb/2400c3a9/2353389328/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-skills-ad?gpsid=13_55_4138&refcode=eem18_181027_SkilAD_resend_fnd_gq_nono__TG_ettxx&utm_campaign=em18_181027_SkilAD_resend_fnd_gq_nono__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+our+new+TV+ad+and+then+chip+in++as")**

clean_body: RE: Joe Biden, Mark Warner, Anne Holton, Paul Begala and Tim Kaine. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | "" | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, you've gotten a lot of emails from some pretty invested people: Joe Biden emailed you (re: Virginia) Mark Warner emailed you (re: There's a lot to say but I'll try to keep it short) Anne Holton emailed you (re: I don't love doing this, but it's important) Paul Begala emailed you (re: Jeez) And Tim Kaine himself emailed you (re: Sorry it's early - can you look at this?) This is our last end of month fundraising goal of the entire election. There are only 10 more days to ask for help. After that we'll just be left with whatever happens at the polls on November 6th. "" "" So I 'm going to ask while I still can: Will you join Joe, Mark, Anne, Paul and Tim and chip in a little to help us raise $58,703 more in the next four days? We're running out of time:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" We're just ten days away from fewer emails, fewer fundraising goals, and fewer deadlines. Stick with us until then, please Derek. "" I don't know about you, but I'd rather have a full inbox than be full of regrets. Kelly Kelly Langford Email Team, Kaine for Virginia | "" "" ""

A Republican running for statewide office has never won more than 900,000 -- and that won't change in 10 days. Democrats outnumber Republicans 2-to-1 in this state, and for months we've known a blue wave is coming. subject: A note from a former president

body:

---

| | Hi Peter. I'm Martin Sheen. I may not be a real-life President, but there are three things I've learned about real-life politics. First: What's happening right now in America is not normal. The rhetoric coming from Washington is hateful and in opposition to the values of inclusion and equality America was built on. Second: To protect the principles we care so deeply about from the extremely partisan atmosphere -- like access to health care, a secure retirement, or investments in education or infrastructure -- we need to keep good lawmakers in place. **Senator Sherrod Brown is one of those lawmakers.** He doesn't just talk about progressive values; he embodies them. He fights for them. He's an authentic leader. Third: **We need to step up.** Never doubt that a group of concerned citizens, however small, can make a big difference. [**Peter, I'm asking you to help Sherrod. His October deadline is in 4 days, and he needs to reach $400,000. Can you give $5, $10, or more to help him reach that goal?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee5/4462dc26/71e1caa2/201f294f/777313444/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027ms?refcode=sbe181027ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee5/4462dc26/71e1caa2/201f294e/777313444/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027ms?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181027ms_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee5/4462dc26/71e1caa2/201f294e/777313444/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027ms?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181027ms_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee5/4462dc26/71e1caa2/201f294e/777313444/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3bXMiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027ms?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181027ms_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffee5/4462dc26/71e1caa2/201f294f/777313444/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3bXMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027ms?refcode=sbe181027ms_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** I've played a lot of roles in my career. | | I'm tired of Trump's disgusting attacks against women. His insults and grotesque comments are unacceptable coming from anyone, much less the president. Team, we need to send Trump a clear message -- **_we will not stand for your disgusting rhetoric or your backward policy agenda._** [**Let's make the upcoming midterm a referendum on Trump and his Party. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We are fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Georgians won't be intimidated. We will make our voices heard. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa74a/34a064cc/184579/70cbb5e/2305670829/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - Last week, we learned that officials in Gwinnett County were throwing out absentee ballots, allegedly because signatures on the ballots did not exactly match names on voter registrations. Then, a federal judge stepped in to stop them. Now, Brian Kemp has filed a motion to stay that judge's ruling which would have protected voters from having their ballots thrown out without due process. Make no mistake: _We are fighting back_. Our Voter Protection Team is working around the clock to protect eligible Georgia voters' rights. We will ensure every eligible ballot cast is a ballot counted. In the meantime, we need to do everything we can to beat Brian Kemp this November. Kemp has proven again and again that he cannot be trusted to protect our most basic civil rights. He does not deserve a promotion from Secretary of State to Governor. Efforts to suppress the vote or depress voter turnout should always make us outraged and activated, not complacent. But voter suppression only works if we let it. That's why I'm asking now: **[Make a $3 donation to support our Voter Protection Team so they can fight back against Kemp's voter suppression tactics today and every day between now and November 6th. The polls are open for early voting and absentee ballots have already been cast. We cannot wait another minute.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa74a/34a064cc/184579/70cbb5f/2305670829/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDI3MjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE10272018-full")** Your right to vote is sacred, but the only way to protect it is to use it. So please, go vote, and support our Voter Protection Team with a donation so others can do the same. Georgians won't be intimidated. We will make our voices heard - _because this is our time._ Yours in the fight, Stacey Abrams

Friend,

Do you understand what is at stake this November?

Just imagine for a moment, a United States Senate that gives into anything Donald Trump wants.

More extreme Supreme Court justices, repealing Obamacare, threatening Social Security, Medicare, Planned Parenthood, and standing with the NRA.

We can't let that happen.

[**But that is what is at stake November. Watch our new ad and then help us ensure that every voter realizes how serious this election is by chipping in $5 or more to keep it on the air.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cfc/3af3c5d/3809a86b/4ec31231/819212633/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-imagine?gpsid=5_73_4739&refcode=em18_181026_Imagin_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&noskip=true&utm_campaign=em18_181026_Imagin_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+But+that+is+what+is+at+stake+November+Wa")

This is not our vision for America. And we know it is not yours either. Democratic Senator Bob Menendez is doing all he can to stop this nightmare from becoming a reality but he needs you now more than ever.

**Your vote is all that stands between us and four more years of a Trump controlled Senate.**

[**Your voice has never mattered more. Stop Trump and Republicans like Bob Hugin from continuing their unchecked, reckless agenda by helping us keep this ad on the air until Election Day - chip in $5 or more now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cfc/3af3c5d/3809a86b/4ec31233/819212633/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-imagine?gpsid=5_73_4739&refcode=em18_181026_Imagin_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&noskip=true&utm_campaign=em18_181026_Imagin_fnd_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Your+voice+has+never+mattered+more+Stop+")

Thank you,

Frank Schultz

"=" Yours, Tom ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

body:

Yesterday was Nevada Day. Today, in Carson City, Steve celebrated 154 years of our state's history at the Nevada Day parade.

And Team Sisolak came out strong:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1QAOkTXDU1nLz7qUSvutLM3ysAT2-DpeLG5LSRMRQwg=/0e2nwJvwUBj3yzDczZC5dOU5w-Hup8FeWpjNdl18cI4=?gpsid=37_57_4776&refcode=em18_181027_NDkick_IG1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181027_NDkick_IG1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Across the state, voters are energized and ready to elect a governor who will keep Nevada moving forward. But with just ten days left before votes are counted, we need your help to spread his message.

**[If you missed it yesterday, read Steve's Nevada Day message about his plan to move our state forward, then help make his vision a reality by chipping in $5 or more today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1QAOkTXDU1nLz7qUSvutLM3ysAT2-DpeLG5LSRMRQwg=/0e2nwJvwUBj3yzDczZC5dOU5w-Hup8FeWpjNdl18cI4=?gpsid=37_57_4776&refcode=em18_181027_NDkick_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181027_NDkick_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Team Sisolak

\----- Forwarded Message -----
From: Steve Sisolak <info@stevesisolak.com>
Date: Friday, Oct 26
Subj: 154

Dear Friend,

This campaign has been long and sometimes grueling, but today on Nevada Day, I want to take a moment to reflect on what it all means.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1QAOkTXDU1nLz7qUSvutLM3ysAT2-DpeLG5LSRMRQwg=/0e2nwJvwUBj3yzDczZC5dOU5w-Hup8FeWpjNdl18cI4=?gpsid=37_57_4776&refcode=em18_181027_NDkick_IG2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181027_NDkick_IG2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
I see so much opportunity in our state.

The economy is changing, but if we make the right investments, our people can rise with it. I saw that firsthand when I worked to bring the Golden Knights to Las Vegas. The development of some of the most advanced manufacturing centers in the world in northern Nevada is another sign of our potential. And, after talking with countless workers and voters, I know our people are ready to meet the challenge.

But prosperity won't happen by chance.

If we don't address the overcrowding in our classrooms, our kids will fall behind, and they'll be blocked from achieving everything we know they're capable of. I went to public schools, and I sent my daughters to public schools, so I'm committed to seeing them succeed. That's why as governor, I'll fully fund our education system. I'll also make sure that educators earn what they deserve so they don't have to work multiple jobs just to make ends meet.

Once our kids get a good education and grow up to succeed in these new jobs, we have to make sure they can keep themselves and their families healthy without cutting back financially, going bankrupt, or worse. That's why I want to make quality health care affordable by protecting Medicaid expansion and by standing up to Trump and the Republicans' attempts to revoke protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

Take today to celebrate how far Nevada has come in 154 years since we were admitted as a state. Then, **[help us keep moving our state forward into the future by chipping in $5 or whatever you can](https://act.myngp.com/el/1QAOkTXDU1nLz7qUSvutLM3ysAT2-DpeLG5LSRMRQwg=/0e2nwJvwUBj3yzDczZC5dOU5w-Hup8FeWpjNdl18cI4=?gpsid=37_57_4776&refcode=em18_181027_NDkick_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181027_NDkick_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)** and by casting your ballot on or before November 6th.

Thanks for being part of this. Let's finish strong!

Steve

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/1QAOkTXDU1nLz7qUSvutLM3ysAT2-DpeLG5LSRMRQwg=/0e2nwJvwUBj3yzDczZC5dOU5w-Hup8FeWpjNdl18cI4=?gpsid=37_57_4776&refcode=em18_181027_NDkick_B2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181027_NDkick_B2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Friend,

As you’re well aware, Wisconsin welcomed a special visitor to our state this past week.

After touching down in Mosinee, President Trump took that stage and immediately stressed the importance of supporting me and Governor Walker.

As I stood behind the President and heard him exclaim “WE NEED LEAH,” I began to think about just how far this race has come.

**FIRST:** Everyone counted us out. They said “she can’t take down a sitting U.S. Senator.” She doesn’t have what it takes.

**THEN:** I shared my vision for a better Wisconsin. People from across the state learned about my plans to bring our Wisconsin values to the Senate. They began to see Senator Baldwin for who she really is: a high taxing, big-government supporting radical politician – who even tried to cover up veterans suffering at the Tomah VA.

**NOW:** The leader of the free world is on our side, exclaiming that our race is closer than ever. We’re so close to sending Tammy Baldwin packing, and keeping her extreme left-wing agenda far away from our communities.

We’ve come so far, friend. And now with the support of President Trump, we’re closer than ever. **[I need you to help us keep up this momentum.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=19985a37d5d54c298fb63396a72c56b6&_e=UhA6GEhw1yy-oQ0RHMHxcfYp2SXWVY8ipQlzSAqx_xxg-TKX1xpqAEYUD0q6Hxm6GpXlRtSJcSbQt2xNXsc3Xn5sPdWBpeJQd_fSY7tlIykcumvZzf6X-AWf045nb0jbMjo1Ym7_GMP31qttSMNfdSUYV5xsFQcur13HzbBDdBAO2ZxGfZsA6emlqSShhueGCz6nJ1FZH-VxJGf0L-JNegrqXD4HO3S0v_Y5WeevTvYK5xF253ymUdEIlfjGXSL4f4hNZeKJPM6Qxs4mZ6N4FWhgCbY9Ix0mRlRxukKooIHX4KIR9ERSkHU9h8gwW938iK5-mhgEpotGs1f_yTQ1eQnHJikJbN3P1YCEa67IUpRJDWNQHOenvDZN0m0WVgkEX0v0l2SBKxd36iLLYIo8aUtdIaU85GYflg9gcsLo5_c%3D)**

** **
From day one, I’ve known we can do this. I’ve heard from thousands of Wisconsinites who are hungry for a change in leadership. I’ve always believed in Wisconsin’s ability to stand up and fight when our values are threatened.

Looking at the numbers today, I have the hard proof I need to know that this election is well within reach.

With your help, we CAN take down Senator Baldwin, and we CAN give President Trump the ally he needs in the Senate.

But we can’t do it without you stepping up.

[**Friend, will you join me and show your support by chipping in $25?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=19985a37d5d54c298fb63396a72c56b6&_e=UhA6GEhw1yy-oQ0RHMHxcfYp2SXWVY8ipQlzSAqx_xxMO4PlIW3lFk-gl0ethhSC3H_Xi95LLzdEiWCW0dK5YxpvsyD7dKvI-lSRX5OZFLKOinTAK3JAtc0nhAuSb5qxqpqbCZrMr9mrGerwj28eG4j4u9BewScKQfLCyzic8CFP8b02Q-dtiLBaX1s35HIJu32rLqCyoJ3E-z-O1j0mHr17kAygADZgkaJPcPiuAmxGX36hIMJcuc9Evdf32ZRXEwq3_XaummFhSOYKB9az-uuXggboiFQGnuWGo_1EdKivpejkg-g7mjgAnAxE0Oe2ake4fPeodeDz93EfpzraqSC1rL7viFFugVdUOtoDlAPF0Ib2sRWfcCpm_L5sy4FlaC7nMMoLFhJOYkbEy5iPAhvbnOMlkBRkvGjq_Wc-AUupIXNiBBgUV938AGhscEl1)

clean_body: As you’re well aware, Wisconsin welcomed a special visitor to our state this past week. After touching down in Mosinee, President Trump took that..... ** Friend, As you’re well aware, Wisconsin welcomed a special visitor to our state this past week. After touching down in Mosinee, President Trump took that stage and immediately stressed the importance of supporting me and Governor Walker. As I stood behind the President and heard him exclaim “WE NEED LEAH,” I began to think about just how far this race has come. FIRST: Everyone counted us out. They said “she can’t take down a sitting U.S. Senator.” She doesn’t have what it takes. THEN: I shared my vision for a better Wisconsin. People from across the state learned about my plans to bring our Wisconsin values to the Senate. They began to see Senator Baldwin for who she really is: a high taxing, big-government supporting radical politician – who even tried to cover up veterans suffering at the Tomah VA. NOW: The leader of the free world is on our side, exclaiming that our race is closer than ever. We’re so close to sending Tammy Baldwin packing, and keeping her extreme left-wing agenda far away from our communities. We’ve come so far, friend. And now with the support of President Trump, we’re closer than ever. From day one, I’ve known we can do this. I’ve heard from thousands of Wisconsinites who are hungry for a change in leadership. I’ve always believed in Wisconsin’s ability to stand up and fight when our values are threatened. Looking at the numbers today, I have the hard proof I need to know that this election is well within reach. With your help, we CAN take down Senator Baldwin, and we CAN give President Trump the ally he needs in the Senate. But we can’t do it without you stepping up. There are only 10 DAYS left until Election Day. We need to make every day count. -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: Today's shooting in Pittsburgh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61580/images/logo.png]

Peter,

My heartfelt thoughts and prayers go out today to the victims and families of the tragic shooting this morning at the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh. This was a brazen anti-Semitic attack on the Jewish holy Sabbath, which also occurred during what is normally a joyous event - a baby naming ceremony.

Let me be clear - there is no place in our society for anti-Semitism or any other form of hatred, bigotry, or discrimination. It runs counter to the basic tenets of liberty and acceptance that our great American democracy was built on and it cannot be tolerated. Ours is a diverse society based on the concepts of inclusiveness and freedom of religion, principles that we must continue to fight for as long as actions inspired by cold hatred sadly continue to darken our doorstep.

Sincerely,

J.D. Scholten

| | | Hi there - This is your friendly reminder that today is Mandatory Saturday here in Georgia! That means that by law, polls are open somewhere in each Georgia county today to allow even more people to cast their ballot. So if you prefer to vote on a weekend day, this weekend is your last chance! Early voting this year is critical because we're leaving nothing to chance. We're getting our votes in early so we can bank our votes for certain - and still have plenty of time to knock on doors afterwards to ensure other folks cast their ballot as well. So if you haven't had a chance to vote early yet, now is your chance! **[Click here to find your polling location and hours. Even if you think you know where to go, double check just in case! It might have changed since the last time you voted.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa74d/34a064cc/122e48/70cb916/3552949020/VEsE/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/")** We've got 10 days left to win this election. body:
Derek, in a recent interview Corey Stewart said he's working harder than Tim Kaine to win this race. Not a chance. -------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, in a recent interview Corey Stewart said _he 's working harder than Tim Kaine to win this race_. Not a chance.

We're working tirelessly -- the whole team, Tim included. But what's keeping us up at night is this: **We 're all worried we won't hit $80,000 by Wednesday, October 31st. We're having an emergency meeting later to talk about the budget, and what we may have to cut.**

Corey Stewart is just making this about himself, while Tim is working to raise and use resources in a way that will get all the Democratic House candidates elected, too. Running a race this way is a lot more difficult, and it also makes fundraising goals that much more important: [We are not the only ones depending on this goal being met.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10e0/3e0906/7435f283/3e373310/457472491/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181027_2_FR_JN_jenny-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+are+not+the+only+ones+depending+on+th&utm_campaign=20181027_2_FR_JN_jenny-LDND&source=20181027_2_FR_JN_jenny-LDND")

I'll fight like hell to protect the budget in Richmond, Hampton Roads, and all our critical flip districts -- but I need some backup. **We need to raise $12,000 by the time I walk into that meeting, putting us only $41,190 from our goal, or there 's not much else I can do to protect our most critical areas from these cuts.**

I'm not ready to give up, or say this is a disaster. **This is _potentially_ bad news, but if we all step up to get this goal back on track, I think we can prevent these budget cuts completely:** [Donate here to help us fully fund the program that will re-elect Tim Kaine and will flip House seats from Red to Blue in 10 days.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10e0/3e0906/7435f283/3e373317/457472491/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181027_2_FR_JN_jenny-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Donate+here+to+help+us+fully+fund+the+pr&utm_campaign=20181027_2_FR_JN_jenny-LDND&source=20181027_2_FR_JN_jenny-LDND")

Because Republicans in Congress have lost their way, and we desperately need a change in direction. | | | Hi there - As I write this, thousands of Georgians are participating in our Weekend of Action. It's the final weekend of early voting, so our team has to make the most of it. Here's the truth: All the polls show our race is essentially tied, and here in Georgia, getting more votes than our opponent isn't enough. We need to break 50% in order to avoid a runoff campaign and win this election for Stacey Abrams NOW. But the polls aren't counting on us turning out unlikely eligible voters! They're counting on the same people who voted in 2016, 2014, and every election for years before that. But Stacey Abrams is giving more Georgians than ever a reason to vote - even those who haven't made their voice heard at the ballot box before. But ours is a new kind of campaign. We're reaching unlikely voters because we're taking our work to places where Democrats don't usually campaign. But this election will be won or lost on Georgians' front steps, so we need as many of our supporters as possible knocking doors. That's why I ask: **[Will you join us for our LAST Weekend of Action of the campaign? Sign up for your volunteer shift today. This is important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa740/34a064cc/7d1508/70cb506/2504789949/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** We have an opportunity to prove that our campaign strategy of reaching out to every Georgian, in every community, actually works! That this, _right here_ , is how we win. But I can't do it alone, and neither can Stacey. We need _you._ Are you with us? \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
